dct_title_s: Valley of the brook Kedron : between Jerusalem and the Mount of Olives
dct_description_sm: drawn by J.M.W. Turner from a sketch by C. Barry ; engraved by E. Finden.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Shows topography, drainage, places of historical interest.
